finding_results.notes: Rewrote Luis's sponsor exchange from aphoristic lines into page-anchored accountability prompts (named entities, documentable claims, self-implication, and required call-before-send), while retaining only one transit metaphor.
finding_results.summary: Luis now speaks in practical sequence tied to the marked pages instead of stacked maxims, with concrete prompts that force verifiable method and accountability under pressure.

summary: Revised chapter_13 dialogue cadence to restore Luis's plainspoken, unsentimental idiolect and satisfy the pass requirement for concrete accountability prompts with reduced aphoristic drift.
